about_us_mission_text: To provide high-quality legal and tax services that empower our clients to achieve their goals with confidence and peace of mind.
about_us_vision_text: To be the leading law firm in the region, recognized for our expertise, integrity, and innovative solutions.
about_us_value_integrity_text: We uphold the highest ethical standards in everything we do.
about_us_value_excellence_text: We strive for the highest quality in our work and services.
about_us_value_client_focused_text: Our clients' success is our top priority.
about_us_story_text: Retrieve Law Firm was founded on the principles of excellence, integrity, and absolute dedication to client success. Over the years, we have grown into one of Armenia's most trusted legal and tax advisory firms.
about_us_cta_title: Ready to secure your Legal Success?
about_us_cta_text: Our experts are ready to assist you with any legal or tax challenges. Schedule your professional consultation today.
practice_area_desc_corporate: Legal structuring, corporate governance, and transactions for businesses of all sizes.
practice_area_desc_tax: Strategic tax planning, dispute resolution, and compliance with local and international regulations.
practice_area_desc_immigration: Visa applications, residency permits, and citizenship processes for individuals and families.
practice_area_desc_ip: Protection of trademarks, copyrights, patents, and trade secrets.
practice_area_desc_real_estate: Property transactions, lease agreements, and development project legal support.
practice_area_desc_banking: Financial regulatory compliance, banking operations, and structured finance.
practice_area_desc_competition: Antitrust compliance, merger reviews, and competition law advisory.
practice_area_desc_energy: Regulatory framework navigation for energy production, distribution, and renewables.
practice_area_desc_investment: Cross-border investment structuring, due diligence, and regulatory approvals.
practice_area_desc_it: GDPR compliance, data security frameworks, and tech sector regulatory advice.
practice_area_desc_health: Healthcare licensing, pharmaceutical regulations, and medical sector compliance.
practice_area_desc_arbitration: Dispute resolution through arbitration and court litigation across jurisdictions.
practice_area_desc_crypto: Legal advisory for crypto assets, blockchain ventures, and DeFi structures.
practice_area_desc_employment: Employment contracts, HR policies, workforce regulations, and dispute advisory.
practice_area_desc_default: Specialized legal advisory tailored to your specific needs and circumstances.

personnel_bios.feliks-hovakimyan: Feliks Hovakimyan is a versatile attorney offering counsel on every aspect of commercial law and legal disputes. With a background in scientific studies and practical experience, he specializes in Corporate Law, Banking and Finance, Public Law, Immigration, and Investment Law. His clientele includes both enterprises and individuals, spanning diverse industries like technology, services, finance, and healthcare. Recognized as a dependable and credible collaborator, Feliks demonstrates an elevated commitment to his clients. His profound sense of duty and professionalism propels him to achieve optimal outcomes in the cases he handles.
personnel_bios.michael-hovhannesyan: Michael Hovhannesyan possesses extensive expertise in various facets of corporate law, specializing in Corporate Law, Mergers and Acquisitions, and Data Protection. His proficiencies extend to industries with stringent regulations like energy and construction, as well as technology, manufacturing, and investments. By delving into the financial and legal complexities that confront both public and private enterprises, Michael devises pragmatic resolutions for everyday business hurdles. These encompass continuous adherence to Armenian securities and corporate legislations, alongside managing commercial agreements.
personnel_bios.vache-simonyan: Vache provides comprehensive legal advice and guidance to clients facing criminal charges, ensuring they understand their rights and potential legal strategies. He represents clients in various court proceedings, including pre-trial hearings, trials, and appeals, where he presents evidence, cross-examines witnesses, and makes compelling legal arguments on their behalf. Additionally, Vache advocates for clients' interests during interactions with law enforcement agencies. He prepares clients for court appearances, offering clarity on the legal process and what to expect. Vache's expertise extends to preparing legal documents like motions, briefs, and petitions, and he conducts thorough research on relevant laws, regulations, and precedents to construct a solid defense strategy tailored to each case.
personnel_bios.lilit-petrosyan: Lilith Petrosyan is an Associate Lawyer at Retrieve Legal and Tax, where she assists local and international clients with practical, business-oriented legal support. She graduated in 2025 from French University of Armenia and Jean Moulin Lyon 3 University, complementing her academic background with internships, international projects, seminars, and short-term exchange programs that strengthened her comparative legal perspective. Her work focuses on civil, contract, corporate, and labor law, with an emphasis on structuring reliable legal frameworks and supporting companies' day-to-day legal needs.
personnel_bios.renata-martirosyan: Renata is a lawyer with a growing focus on corporate and contract law. She advises businesses and individuals on the legal aspects of corporate operations, combining strong academic training with practical legal experience. Her work includes preparing and reviewing corporate documentation, including civil contracts, conducting legal analysis, and supporting clients in ensuring compliance with regulatory frameworks and corporate governance requirements. Renata approaches legal matters with a clear understanding of both legal frameworks and business realities, helping clients find practical and efficient solutions to everyday corporate and commercial challenges.
personnel_bios.aleksandr-harutyunyan: Aleksandr is an experienced Attorney with a demonstrated history of working in the legal services industry with work experience in New York, Paris and Yerevan. Primarily a constitutionalist, he is skilled in arbitration, international business transactions, negotiation, political science, ECHR, international relations, and international law. Clients previously represented by Aleksandr include some of the major construction, advertising and health industry companies in Armenia. He also has demonstrated skills in representing international clients in complex cross-border legal matters.
personnel_bios.iren-aghasyan: Iren Aghasyan stands out as a highly skilled finance professional, showcasing expertise in Financial Accounting, Auditing, and Taxation across a spectrum of industries such as finance, healthcare, and technology. Her track record reflects a consistent ability to navigate intricate financial terrains for both public and private entities. Iren is known for providing practical solutions while rigorously adhering to accounting standards and tax regulations. Her proficiency in managing financial statements with precision ensures accurate and reliable financial reporting. She brings a strategic mindset to developing and implementing effective financial strategies that optimize resources and foster sustainable growth.

legal_services_description: We deliver practical and results-driven legal services through our experienced lawyers and attorneys. Explore our key practice areas below to see how we can support you.
page_legal_services_description: Navigating legal complexities in Armenia requires trusted expertise. Retrieve Legal & Tax offers comprehensive legal services, bringing together seasoned attorneys across diverse practice areas — from business formation and real estate to arbitration, banking, and cryptocurrency law. We deliver clear, practical legal solutions that protect your interests and support your long-term goals.
tax_business_advisory_description: Our law firm delivers integrated tax and business advisory services, supporting companies at every stage of growth. From accounting and tax planning to corporate finance and M&A advisory, we help you make informed, compliant, and strategic decisions.
page_tax_business_advisory_description: Managing taxes and business finances in Armenia requires more than numbers — it requires strategy. Retrieve Legal & Tax brings together experienced advisors across accounting, tax planning, corporate finance, and M&A advisory. Whether you are a startup, growing business, or individual, we deliver tailored financial solutions that keep you compliant, competitive, and positioned for long-term growth.

why_choose_us_title: Why Choose Retrieve as Your Law Firm in Armenia
why_choose_us_desc:
Navigating legal, tax, and regulatory requirements in Armenia requires more than general knowledge — it requires a law firm that understands the local system from the inside and has a proven track record of delivering results for foreign founders, investors, and businesses.

At Retrieve Legal & Tax, we combine deep expertise in Armenian law with a client-first approach that makes complex processes straightforward, transparent, and efficient.

why_choose_us_items.Proven Expertise_desc: A team of experienced attorneys and advisors with a track record of success in corporate law, tax planning, immigration, and more — delivering legal solutions that are practical, compliant, and results-driven.
why_choose_us_items.Personalized Service_desc: Legal services designed to meet the unique needs of each client, ensuring practical and effective outcomes regardless of the complexity of the matter.
why_choose_us_items.Local Knowledge & Global Reach_desc: As a law firm in Armenia with international expertise, we combine deep understanding of Armenian law with cross-border experience — giving clients the best of both local and global legal practice.
why_choose_us_items.Reliable Results_desc: Trusted by global brands like Shell, WWF, QLESS, and REMAX, as well as local startups and organizations — a track record that speaks to the quality and consistency of our legal services across corporate, tax, and immigration matters.

team_subtitle: Behind every client matter at Retrieve Legal & Tax is a dedicated team of lawyers who bring hands-on experience across the full range of Armenian legal and regulatory practice. We believe that legal expertise is most valuable when it is accessible, clear, and genuinely client-focused — and that is the standard every member of our team is held to.

about_preview_title: About Retrieve Law Firm in Armenia
about_preview_text_1: Welcome to Retrieve Legal & Tax, a full-service law firm in Armenia and tax advisory practice based in Yerevan. Founded by practicing attorneys Feliks Hovakimyan and Maykl Hovhannesyan with deep roots in both Armenian and international law, our legal professionals help businesses, founders, and investors navigate the legal and regulatory landscape of Armenia — and beyond.
about_preview_text_2: Whether you are a startup registering your first entity, a multinational expanding into the South Caucasus, an iGaming operator seeking a license, or a foreign investor structuring a cross-border transaction, Retrieve brings precise legal thinking and practical business insight to every matter we handle. From our offices in Yerevan, we deliver comprehensive legal services tailored to the needs of clients operating locally and across borders.
